overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character traverses an orange pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highways and past industrial buildings, with the Arasaka corporate tower visible in the background. The scene features clear midday lighting with a warm, saturated color palette typical of the game's aesthetic.

pedestrian in orange outfit walks past the camera on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange pedestrian path, passing by industrial buildings and approaching the elevated highway

concrete industrial building with metal containers and weathered facade
multi-level highway overpass structure spanning across the street
tall utility pole with multiple overhead wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a distinctive orange pedestrian path in a futuristic urban setting. An industrial warehouse stands on the right while vehicles pass on the left. The iconic Arasaka tower looms in the distance beneath a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the Arasaka tower looming overhead
camera tilts back down to walking level as the character continues forward

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway beneath the overpass, briefly looking up at the towering corporate building

notable_agents.action: person in red outfit walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with NO CORPOS graffiti visible
modern street lamp with orange fixture

segments.scene_description: Walking under the elevated highway, the camera briefly tilts up to admire the massive Arasaka tower. The path runs alongside a concrete retaining wall with graffiti, while the overpass structure creates partial shade over the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with street signage and traffic control

red and white commercial signage for CorpoPlaza
overhead traffic signal structure with multiple lights

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an urban intersection marked by green street signs for El Camino Real and MLK Boulevard. Traffic lights and commercial signage become prominent as the walkway continues beneath the elevated highway structure.

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered area beneath the highway, approaching industrial zone with large satellite dishes

curved concrete highway ramp passing directly overhead
industrial building complex housing the satellite dishes

segments.scene_description: The character enters a shadowed corridor beneath massive highway ramps. The environment becomes more industrial, with large satellite dishes visible in a compound to the left. The lighting shifts to low-light conditions under the concrete overpass structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a vibrant urban walkway that gradually descends from a bright, open cityscape into a shadowed industrial underpass. It begins with the character walking along a distinctive orange pedestrian path, flanked by an industrial warehouse and passing vehicles while the Arasaka tower looms in the distance under a clear blue sky. As the camera moves beneath an elevated highway, it briefly tilts upward toward the massive tower before continuing past a graffiti-covered concrete retaining wall. The scene then opens into an urban intersection marked by green street signs for El Camino Real and MLK Boulevard, where traffic lights and commercial signage become prominent. Finally, the walkway leads the character into a shadowed corridor beneath massive highway ramps, shifting the lighting to low-light conditions as large satellite dishes appear in a nearby industrial compound.
